zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Musgrave II於大約1397年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德哈特雷時，他的父親Sir Thomas Musgrave IV14歲，母親Joan Dacre20歲。他於大約1413年與Lady Elizabeth Betham結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年11月9日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Musgrave II于大约1397年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德哈特雷时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Musgrave IV14岁，母亲Joan Dacre20岁。他于大约1413年与Lady Elizabeth Betham结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年11月9日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德吉可比 斯蒂芬。

nameMeanings.name: Musgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Musgrove
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Musgrave in Cumbria. The placename derives from Old English mūs ‘mouse’ + grāf ‘copse, grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Musgrave II was born about 1397, in Hartley, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Thomas Musgrave IV, was 14 and his mother, Joan Dacre, was 20. He married Lady Elizabeth Betham about 1413. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 9 November 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Musgrave II est né environ 1397, à Hartley, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Musgrave IV, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Joan Dacre, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Betham environ 1413. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Musgrave II um 1397 in Hartley, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Musgrave IV 14 und seine Mutter Joan Dacre 20. Er hat um 1413 Lady Elizabeth Betham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1464 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Musgrave II è nato il circa 1397 nel Hartley, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Musgrave IV, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Joan Dacre, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Betham circa 1413. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Musgrave IIが約1397年にイギリスウエストモーランドハートリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Musgrave IVは14歳，母Joan Dacreは20歳であった。約1413年にLady Elizabeth Bethamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年11月9日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドキルクビー ステフンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Musgrave II(이)가 대략 1397년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 하틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Musgrave IV(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Dacre(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1413년 Lady Elizabeth Betham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 11월 9일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 커k비 스티븐에 묻혔다.

mn.Hartly Castle, Kirkby Stephen, Westmorel: Hartley, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Musgrave II nasceu aproximadamente 1397, em Hartley, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Musgrave IV, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Joan Dacre, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Betham aproximadamente 1413. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Musgrave II родился около 1397 г. в местности хартли, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Musgrave IV было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Dacre, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Betham около 1413 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 9 ноября 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности киркби стифен, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Musgrave II nació aproximadamente 1397, en Hartley, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Musgrave IV, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Joan Dacre, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Betham aproximadamente 1413. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
